AI-Powered Analytics & Adoption Platform | Pendo

Get a Demo
Demo
Close the gap between AI spend and AI adoption.
Pendo captures user behavior across your software and agents, identifies where users struggle, and puts that context to work—so your AI gets smarter in real time and every user gets a better experience.
Get a Demo
Explore the platform
Give your AI agents the context they need
Pendo connects behavioral data to every agent you build or buy, then measures if they're driving the outcomes you care about.

Pendo for IT

Everything you need to understand users and drive adoption—for products and agents.

them
fast.”
Chad Holdorf
VP of Product, Demandbase
“We’re getting input [from Pendo] directly inside the product, right as users interact with [our] agents. We’re learning whether it’s helping them do their job, whether it’s actually moving pipeline. That kind of feedback is critical to building the right agents—and improving them fast.”
“We can be faster, we can be more nimble, we can be more innovative because we get the information faster [with Pendo].”
“To me, ‘Pendo’ing it’ means that I’m empowered to go in and make positive changes for our users on my own, without needing to involve the development team. Now we always say, ‘We’ll fix it with Pendo,’ because it allows us to create value for our users on our own as product people.”
“What used to be a lot of errors happening at once went to effectively zero.”

New · Free Beta
Shipping with AI coding Agents? Try Novus.
Connect your repo and Novus auto-instruments your product in about 30 minutes.
Try Novus Free
Our pricing philosophy
Interested in customizing your plan?
Talk to Sales today
All-in access
When you buy a Pendo module, you get full functionality – no gated features, no forced upgrades. While other vendors fence capabilities by plan, you get complete access from day one to scale without limits.
Savings as you scale
As you upgrade plans or add usage, the incremental cost of adding more Pendo decreases. We build volume-based savings into our pricing, so you can plan growth with confidence.
Predictable by design
No bait and switch. We don’t hook you with a low starting price and surprise you later. Your pricing is clear upfront, and changes only when your usage or plan changes.
Find the right Pendo for you
✓ = included in bundle
$ = available for purchase as add-on

Pendo Pricing FAQ
+
−
How does Pendo pricing work?
Pendo pricing combines two things: the number of Monthly Active Users (MAUs) you track and the functionality you choose as part of your plan. As you add more MAUs, your overall price increases, but the cost per MAU goes down.
This model makes it simple to start small and expand as your needs grow. You only pay for the scale and functionality that create value for your business, and you can add more at any time. Our focus is helping you grow adoption and realize greater value from Pendo, so our priorities remain directly tied to the outcomes that matter most to you.
+
−
What is a Monthly Active User in Pendo?
Monthly active users (MAUs) are the number of unique visitors who were active in your app over the last 30 calendar days. In general, a unique visitor is counted as an active user if they engage with your app(s) at least once within a specified time period.
+
−
Does the number of applications I have, or the number of sessions I have affect my pricing with Pendo?
No. Pendo pricing is based on Monthly Active Users (MAUs), not the number of applications you track or the number of sessions a user has. You can use Pendo across multiple applications at no additional cost per application. In fact, adding more applications gives you richer insights and a more complete view of your users.
+
−
Does Pendo offer discounts?
Volume and bundle discounts are already built into our pricing. We can also tailor additional options to your specific business needs. Your Pendo representative can guide you through the best fit.
+
−
Does Pendo offer a free trial?
Yes. We offer a 30-day free trial of the full Pendo platform. Because Pendo is an extensive solution, we recommend starting with the areas most relevant to your goals, then expanding from there.
If you’re already a customer and want to try additional functionality, reach out. We’re happy to set up trial access so you can explore new features when the timing is right for your team.
+
−
How is the Pendo free trial different from Pendo Free, and how do I choose?
Pendo Free is our free-forever version that helps teams get started with improving their software experience. It includes product analytics, in-app guides, Pendo-branded roadmaps, and Pendo-branded NPS surveys, and supports unlimited web and mobile app keys for up to 500 monthly active users (MAUs). It’s a great way to explore core functionality and see the power of Pendo in action.
The 30-day free trial gives you access to the entire platform – analytics, in-app guides, feedback, journey orchestration, and more – so you can experience everything before choosing the plan that fits your needs. If you want the full picture of what Pendo can do, the trial is the best place to start.
+
−
Can I customize a Pendo plan?
Our bundles are designed to deliver the most value by combining capabilities that work best together. That said, we know every business is different and plans can be customized based on your business needs. Talk to a rep for more information.
+
−
What integrations does Pendo support?
Pendo connects with more than 85 tools across CRM, support, marketing automation, collaboration, and analytics platforms. For the complete list, visit the
Pendo integrations page
.
+
−
What happens if I exceed my Pendo plan limits?
If you’re on a paid plan, exceeding your MAU limit won’t disrupt your Pendo experience. Your functionality will continue to run without interruption. Your Pendo account representative will reach out to understand whether the increase is due to expected growth that may require a contract adjustment, or if it’s a configuration issue we can help resolve.
If you’re on Pendo Free, exceeding the MAU limit means you won’t be able to create new guides, NPS surveys, or segments until you upgrade to a paid plan.
No pressure. Just answers.
See how Pendo works for your specific challenges, whether you’re tracking adoption, proving ROI, or measuring AI.

Try Free today ->

analysis.name: Pendo
analysis.tagline: Close the gap between AI spend and AI adoption.
analysis.value_proposition: AI-powered analytics and adoption platform that captures user behavior across software and AI agents to drive adoption, retention, and product outcomes.
analysis.ideal_customer: Product, IT, Revenue, and Marketing teams at enterprise SaaS companies deploying AI agents and multi-product portfolios

features.name: product analytics
features.description: Track user behavior across web and mobile apps

features.name: agent analytics
features.description: Measure AI agent adoption, usage, and impact on outcomes
features.evidence_quote: Measure how users interact with AI agents and connect those experiences to real outcomes

features.name: in-app guides
features.description: Deliver in-app onboarding, tooltips, and walkthroughs

features.name: session replay
features.description: Watch recordings of user sessions

features.name: listen
features.description: Aggregate user voice and feedback into product insights
features.evidence_quote: Turn user voices into product insights.

features.name: predict
features.description: AI churn prediction and upsell opportunity models
features.evidence_quote: Predict churn risks and upsell opportunities.

features.name: sentiment surveys
features.description: NPS, PMF, CSAT, and UX-Lite in-app surveys

features.name: orchestrate
features.description: Cross-channel journeys using email and in-app guides
features.evidence_quote: Build cross-channel journeys using emails and in-app guides.

features.name: data sync
features.description: Bi-directional data sync to break down silos

features.name: leo ai assistant
features.description: Natural language Q&A over product data
features.evidence_quote: Ask Pendo questions in natural language and get answers without building reports.

features.name: mcp server
features.description: Model Context Protocol server to query Pendo from Claude, Cursor, or other LLMs
features.evidence_quote: Connect Pendo data to Claude, Cursor, or any AI tool

features.name: retroactive analytics
features.description: Access complete product data history from day of install
features.evidence_quote: Access your product's complete data history from the day you install Pendo.

features.name: resource center
features.description: In-app hub for help content and self-service
features.evidence_quote: Get easy access to the information you need to work better with Pendo.

features.name: feedback collection
features.description: Collect user feature requests

features.name: validate
features.description: Validate product ideas with users

features.name: mobile sdk
features.description: Native SDK for iOS/Android analytics and guides
features.evidence_quote: Install the Pendo SDK to provide analytics and guides across all of your mobile apps.

features.name: browser extension implementation
features.description: Deploy Pendo via browser extension launcher on third-party apps
features.evidence_quote: Install and configure Pendo by deploying the Pendo Launcher on your third-party applications.

features.name: direct web implementation
features.description: JavaScript snippet install for web apps
features.evidence_quote: Install and configure Pendo by inserting a JavaScript code block directly into your application.

features.name: funnels
features.description: Funnel analysis for conversion tracking
features.evidence_quote: Add funnels & paths to a dashboard

features.name: paths
features.description: Path analysis of user journeys
features.evidence_quote: Add funnels & paths to a dashboard

features.name: feature tagging
features.description: Tag UI elements to track feature engagement
features.evidence_quote: Feature tag specific areas of URL

features.name: product discovery
features.description: Discovery and idea validation tooling

features.name: journey orchestration
features.description: Multi-step user journey orchestration

features.name: oem partners
features.description: Manage OEM subscriptions and analytics for end customers
features.evidence_quote: Manage Pendo OEM subscriptions, analytics, and guides for end customers.

features.name: novus auto-instrumentation
features.description: Repo-connected auto-instrumentation for AI-coded products (Free Beta)
features.evidence_quote: Connect your repo and Novus auto-instruments your product in about 30 minutes.

features.name: multi-app support
features.description: Track multiple applications under one plan
features.evidence_quote: You can use Pendo across multiple applications at no additional cost per application.

features.name: sso
features.description: Single sign-on via Okta and enterprise IdPs

features.description: GDPR compliant

features.name: hipaa compliance

features.name: pci dss compliance
features.description: PCI DSS compliant

features.name: webhooks
features.description: Outbound webhook integration

features.name: api access
features.description: Public API and developer docs
features.evidence_quote: View agent and API documentation, SDK release notes, and more.

features.name: polls
features.description: In-app polls with multi-choice/conditional logic
features.evidence_quote: Creating a multi-choice poll with a conditional "tell me more" text box

features.name: segment integration
features.description: Native Segment CDP integration

features.name: salesforce integration
features.description: Native Salesforce CRM integration

features.name: jira integration
features.description: Native Jira integration

features.name: data warehouse integration
features.description: Snowflake, BigQuery, Redshift, S3 data connections

features.name: bi tool integration
features.description: Looker, Tableau, Domo BI connectors

features.name: command center
features.description: Central operations dashboard across Pendo products

features.name: issue detection for agents
features.description: Automatically surfaces where AI agents fail
features.evidence_quote: Issue detection to automatically surface where agents fail.

features.name: free trial
features.description: 30-day free trial of full platform
features.evidence_quote: We offer a 30-day free trial of the full Pendo platform.

differentiators: Largest product data set: 35 trillion events, 1B+ users, 50K+ agents/apps
All-in access — no gated features or forced upgrades within a purchased module
Retroactive analytics — full data history from day of install without pre-defining events
MCP server that pipes Pendo data into any LLM (Claude, Cursor, ChatGPT)
MAU-based pricing that ignores app count and session count
Unified platform spanning analytics, guides, replay, sentiment, orchestration, and prediction

recent_ships.what: Novus — free beta AI auto-instrumentation that connects to your repo and instruments the product in ~30 minutes
recent_ships.source: Shipping with AI coding Agents? Try Novus. Connect your repo and Novus auto-instruments your product in about 30 minutes.

recent_ships.what: Agent Analytics — measures AI agent adoption, usage, and connection to retention/revenue
recent_ships.source: Track AI, prove ROI. Measure how users interact with AI agents and connect those experiences to real outcomes

recent_ships.what: Pendo MCP — connects Pendo data to Claude, Cursor, and other LLMs
recent_ships.source: Connect Pendo data to Claude, Cursor, or any AI tool to unlock product context wherever you work.

praised: 'Pendo'ing it means empowerment to make positive changes for users without involving development
In-product feedback captured at moment of AI agent interaction (Demandbase testimonial)
Effectively zero errors after implementation (customer quote)
complaints: Guide display/seen states scoped by Visitor ID rather than browser (community request)
Cross-origin iframe element tagging is difficult (community request)
Android obfuscation challenges with Pendo mobile SDK
No native .NET SDK for ASP.NET Core (community post)
Feature tagging by URL area is limited (community request)

free_tier.limits: Up to 500 MAUs; Pendo-branded; Product Analytics + In-app Guides + NPS only

tiers.name: Free
tiers.headline_inclusions: 500 MAUs, Product Analytics, In-app Guides, NPS (Pendo-branded)

tiers.name: Base
tiers.headline_inclusions: Custom MAU volume; Product Analytics + In-app Guides

tiers.name: Core
tiers.headline_inclusions: Adds Session Replay to Base for full user-journey visibility

tiers.name: Ultimate
tiers.headline_inclusions: Everything + Sentiment surveys, Orchestrate, Listen, Data Sync

tiers.name: Predict (add-on)
tiers.headline_inclusions: Churn/upsell prediction models with CRM & BI connectivity

tiers.name: Agent Analytics (add-on)
tiers.headline_inclusions: Free prompt allowance; adoption metrics + AI issue detection

pricing.notes: MAU-based pricing (unique visitors active in last 30 days); app count and session count don't affect price; volume discounts built in; 30-day free trial of full platform available separately from Free tier; Predict and Agent Analytics sold as add-ons attachable to any plan
